title: Essentia Belle
description: Essentia Belle is a refined, minimalist luxury e-commerce platform for premium fragrances and artisanal scents. Built with a full-stack architecture, the web app features: • AI Fragrance Consultant: A conversational AI assistant powered by Google Gemini that provides point-to-point fragrance recommendations tailored to user moods and occasions. • Dynamic Inventory Dashboard: A comprehensive Admin dashboard with full CRUD capabilities allowing real-time additions and management of custom perfumes, olfactory notes (Top, Heart, Base), and pricing. • Persistent Database Architecture: Integrated Express backend backed by a lightweight, transaction-safe SQLite database (better-sqlite3) for high performance and state preservation. • Custom Blending: Interactive Custom Scent Finder tool supporting bespoke scent curation and laboratory request logs. • High-End Design: A buttery-smooth UI focusing on premium, high-contrast typography, delicate spacing, and beautiful interactive micro-interactions built with Tailwind CSS and Motion.
